text.title: Recruitment Funnel Optimization Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply Recruitment Funnel Optimization. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: normalize-data
step.action: Drop incomplete rows, align column schema, tag stages.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: compute-conversions
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: identify-bottleneck
step.action: Pick the single stage furthest below benchmark.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: hypothesize-cause
step.action: Generate ≥2 candidate causes; rank by evidence weight.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: design-experiment
step.action: Define one intervention, success metric, target lift, decision-by date.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
